name: Talon One - Bounty Hunter
short_description: Fast paced open galaxy shooter. Upgrade your ship, save your team mates and reclaim your position as the leader of the most feared fighter pilots in the galaxy!
detailed_description:
Betrayed by your former master and with your teammates missing, do you possess the resolve to track down your team and reclaim your position as the leader of the most feared fighter pilots in the galaxy?

Embark on a perilous journey as a bounty hunter, using your gains to finance your mission. Plunder, seize and obliterate your way through this unforgiving star system.

Top down 2D shooter where you can navigate around the Andromeda Galaxy.

The galaxy has thousands of simulated ships flying between different stars including
1. Cargo ships
2. Personnel carriers
3. Protection ships
4. Bounty hunters
5. Marauders
6. Battle ships
7. Aliens
8. Assassins

There are 2 ways to play the game, you can simply fly around raiding cargo ships to try and get your name on the global leader board for either most money or most kills; or you can complete the campaign quests.

Completing the campaign will unlock your AI team mates to help with your cause. You can swap back and forth between the different ships which have slightly different capabilities of speed, agility, strength and fire power. All of the ships can be upgraded to the same level.

Once you are fully upgraded you can literally dodge bullets and destroy enemy ships within seconds.

You can choose to play with either keyboard and mouse or controller; both methods are tuned to work perfectly.

The game loads insanely fast and has no loading times between the different stars as you navigate. The Galaxy is truly one large playing area that you can navigate with the help of the AI assistant.
